evals.prompt: I want to start a new project using Object UI with Vite and React. What do I need to install and configure? Give me the full setup.
evals.expected_output: Provides complete setup: package.json dependencies, vite.config.ts, index.css with Shadcn theme and @source directives, tsconfig.json, and a minimal App.tsx with SchemaRenderer.

evals.prompt: My Object UI components render but they have no styling at all — just plain text and bare inputs. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses missing CSS setup: explains need for @source directives, @theme color token mapping, and :root CSS variables. Provides the complete index.css template.

evals.prompt: How do I add the grid and kanban plugins to my existing Object UI project and make sure they're available in my schemas?
evals.expected_output: Shows how to install plugin packages, import them to trigger ComponentRegistry registration, and update @source paths in CSS for plugin styling.
